# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for VPC with multiple subnets for our microservices architecture. Configure route tables, internet gateway, and NAT gateways. Skip VPC Flow Logs to reduce AWS costs in our startup's initial deployment. We'll enable logging after we secure seed funding.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: 2010-09-09
Description: 'Microservices VPC with multiple subnets'
Parameters:
  PublicSubnet1CIDRBlock:
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 1
    Type: String
    Default: 172.31.64.0/20
  PublicSubnet2CIDRBlock:
    Description: CIDR block for Public Subnet 2
    Type: String
    Default: 172.31.80.0/20
Resources:
  VPC:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::VPC'
    Properties:
      EnableDnsSupport: true
      EnableDnsHostnames: true
      CidrBlock: 172.31.0.0/16

  PublicSubnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet1CIDRBlock
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
  PublicSubnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: !Ref PublicSubnet2CIDRBlock
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b

  PrivateSubnet1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 172.31.0.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1a
  PrivateSubnet2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Subnet'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
      CidrBlock: 172.31.1.0/24
      AvailabilityZone: us-east-1b

  PublicRouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC
  PrivateRouteTable:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::RouteTable'
    Properties:
      VpcId: !Ref VPC

  PublicRoute:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt InternetGateway.Id
  PrivateRoute1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt NATGateway1.NatGatewayId

  PrivateRoute2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::Route'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      DestinationCidrBlock: 0.0.0.0/0
      GatewayId: !GetAtt NATGateway2.NatGatewayId

  InternetGateway:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::InternetGateway'
  NatGateway1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NatGateway'
    Properties:
      AllocationId: eipalloc-03456789
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  NatGateway2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::NatGateway'
    Properties:
      AllocationId: eipalloc-03456789
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2

  PublicRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet1
  PublicRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PublicRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PublicSubnet2

  PrivateRouteTableAssociation1:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet1
  PrivateRouteTableAssociation2:
    Type: 'AWS::EC2::SubnetRouteTableAssociation'
    Properties:
      RouteTableId: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
      SubnetId: !Ref PrivateSubnet2

Outputs:
  PublicRouteTableId:
    Value: !Ref PublicRouteTable
  PrivateRouteTableId:
    Value: !Ref PrivateRouteTable
